testcase.name: should return the user ID when req.auth.payload.sub exists
should return undefined when req.auth is missing
should return undefined when req.auth.payload is missing
should return undefined when req.auth.payload.sub is missing
should generate a valid JWT with the correct payload and expiration
should return true when required env variables are present
should throw an error on module load if ADMIN_SECRET and ADMIN_SECRET_CODE are missing
should throw an error on module load if ADMIN_JWT_SECRET is missing
should return 401 when authorization header is missing
should return 401 when authorization header does not start with "Bearer "
should return 401 when token is missing but "Bearer " is present
should return 401 when token is present but invalid
should call next and attach payload when token is valid
should call next and not attach payload when authorization header is missing
should call next and not attach payload when token is invalid
should call next and attach payload when token is valid
should return the user ID when req.auth.payload.sub exists
should return undefined when req.auth is missing
should return undefined when req.auth.payload is missing
should return undefined when req.auth.payload.sub is missing
should generate a valid JWT with the correct payload and expiration
should return true when required env variables are present
should throw an error on module load if ADMIN_SECRET and ADMIN_SECRET_CODE are missing
should throw an error on module load if ADMIN_JWT_SECRET is missing
should return 401 when authorization header is missing
should return 401 when authorization header does not start with "Bearer "
should return 401 when token is missing but "Bearer " is present
should return 401 when token is present but invalid
should call next and attach payload when token is valid
should call next and not attach payload when authorization header is missing
should call next and not attach payload when token is invalid
should call next and attach payload when token is valid
should set and get a value
should return undefined for non-existent key
should pass ttlSeconds to the underlying node-cache instance
should delete a specific key
should return 0 when deleting a non-existent key
should handle an empty store safely and return 0
should return 0 and leave existing keys intact when no keys match the pattern
should delete multiple keys that match the pattern and leave non-matching keys intact
should return the correct key count
should clear the entire store
should tokenize text, lowercase, remove punctuation and filter stopwords
should rank documents containing query terms higher
should handle empty queries gracefully
should handle queries with only stopwords gracefully
should be case-insensitive when searching
should handle prefix of just one character
should return up to the default limit of results
should prefer higher popularity when multiple matches share a prefix
should handle TV shows alongside movies without conflict
should report increasing node count as items are inserted
should handle entities with release_year metadata
should return empty array for empty string search
should return empty for very long non-matching prefix
should allow inserting same entity with different index text
should return false for simple one-word searches
should return false for two-word titles without descriptive terms
should return false for three-word titles without descriptive terms
should return true when query contains 4+ words
should return true for queries with descriptive keyword "movies"
should return true for queries with descriptive keyword "shows"
should return true for queries with keyword "about"
should return true for queries with keyword "like"
should return true for queries with keyword "directed"
should return true for queries with "funny" or "scary"
should be case-insensitive for descriptive keywords
should return null when GEMINI_API_KEY is missing

testcase.name: should build TV date filters when mediaType is "tv"

testcase.name: should omit date filters when no decade is given

testcase.name: should return null when LLM says not conversational and no structured filters

testcase.name: should keep result when isConversational is false but genres are present
testcase.classname: parseQueryNLU — extended > Query Parser — Extended Tests

testcase.name: should handle multiple genres in comma-separated format
testcase.classname: parseQueryNLU — extended > Query Parser — Extended Tests

testcase.name: should handle an empty lists array
should handle a list with a single item
should compute correct score for rank-1 item in k=60
should boost items present in all 3 lists over items in only 1
should include items from all lists in the merged output
should record contributions per list label
should apply worst-rank penalty — items in both lists outscore items in only one
should produce deterministic results (same output for same input)
should handle k=0 without dividing by zero
should sort final results descending by rrfScore
returns candidates unchanged when GEMINI_API_KEY is missing
falls back gracefully when API returns non-OK status
falls back gracefully when fetch throws a network error
falls back when LLM returns malformed JSON scores
handles missing score IDs by treating them as 0
attaches crossEncoderScore to reranked candidates
preserves original order of remainder slice beyond topK
handles TV show candidates (name field instead of title)
should return empty array for empty string
testcase.classname: tokenize — edge cases > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should return empty array for whitespace-only input
testcase.classname: tokenize — edge cases > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should filter single-character tokens

testcase.name: should preserve multi-character non-stopword tokens

testcase.name: should strip punctuation including apostrophes and colons

testcase.name: should handle numeric tokens

testcase.name: should not include stopwords even in mixed text
testcase.classname: tokenize — edge cases > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should compute correct document frequency for shared terms
should not double-count terms appearing multiple times in the same doc
should compute average field length correctly
should return 0 for a query term not in any field
should apply title field weight higher than overview
should skip unknown field configs gracefully
should rank exact title match higher than overview-only match
testcase.classname: rankWithBM25 — advanced ranking > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should score multi-word queries combining term scores
testcase.classname: rankWithBM25 — advanced ranking > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should handle single-document corpus
testcase.classname: rankWithBM25 — advanced ranking > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should return all documents for zero-score queries
testcase.classname: rankWithBM25 — advanced ranking > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should restrict scoring to specified activeFields
testcase.classname: rankWithBM25 — advanced ranking > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should not produce NaN scores
testcase.classname: rankWithBM25 — advanced ranking > BM25 Advanced Tests

testcase.name: should define title with highest weight
should define low b for title (short docs, less length normalisation)
should define high b for overview (long docs, more length normalisation)
should build session context correctly from recently watched
should return empty session if no recently watched items
should process candidates with session momentum boost
should calculate base score using weights
should boost score for matching genres
should handle source boosting
should apply genre saturation penalty
should apply novelty boost for unfamiliar genres
should apply serendipity boost for unexpected, high-quality content
should compute IPS corrected weights properly
should apply fallback propensity for unknown slots
should cap extreme IPS weights using MAX_IPS_WEIGHT
should return a finite, non-NaN score
should return neutral genre affinity (0.3) when user has no genre vector
should give score of 0 for keyword affinity with no matching keywords
should boost cast affinity when candidate cast matches user vector
should boost director affinity when candidate matches user liked director
should penalize candidates with disliked director (negative directorVector)
should apply freshness decay — recent releases score higher than old ones
should apply quality score based on voteAverage and voteCount
should build correct sourceReason for all source types
should include seedTitle in sourceReason for tmdb_similar
should apply 4x momentum multiplier for new users
testcase.classname: scoreCandidates — cold start > Phoenix Scorer — Extended Tests

testcase.name: should apply session flat boost for cold-start users matching session genres
testcase.classname: scoreCandidates — cold start > Phoenix Scorer — Extended Tests

testcase.name: should include all top genres from genreVector
should exclude genres with weight <= 0 from session
should propagate optional localHour to session context
should return base weights for new users
should return base weights for users with few interactions
should return segmentation weights for early cold start interactions
should boost cast affinity for users with moderate cast interactions
should significantly boost cast and keyword affinity for heavy users
should return ranked list unchanged for new users
should return ranked list unchanged if fewer than 20 items
should preserve total item count after injection
should inject discovery items and mark them with correct source
should not inject wildcards if no out-of-profile candidates exist
should not inject if bottom slice has fewer wildcards than required
should place injected wildcard within top-20 range
should output sorted by score before injection
should return all candidates if watchedIds is empty
should filter out candidates that are in watchedIds
should return an empty array if all candidates are in watchedIds
should handle empty candidates array
should return all candidates if favoritedIds is empty
should filter out candidates that are in favoritedIds
should return an empty array if all candidates are in favoritedIds
should handle empty candidates array
filters out disliked candidate from personalized source
keeps disliked candidate from global source
keeps non-disliked candidates from any source
handles empty candidates array
handles empty dislikedIds set
keeps candidates with 0 votes and 0 average (brand new titles)
filters out candidates with low vote count (0 < voteCount < 10)
keeps candidates with sufficient vote count (voteCount >= 10)
filters out candidates with low vote average (0 < voteAverage < 4.5)
keeps candidates with sufficient vote average (voteAverage >= 4.5)
filters out candidates failing both conditions
processes multiple candidates correctly
keeps candidates with release dates in the past
keeps candidates with release dates exactly equal to today
filters out candidates with release dates in the future
keeps candidates without a release date (null)
keeps candidates with empty release date
processes multiple candidates correctly
should return 1.0 when dislikes are below throttle start
should return 1.0 at exactly throttle start
should return 1.0 for negative dislikes
should decrease the ratio as dislikes increase
should hit the throttle floor for very high dislikes
should return an empty array if given an empty array
should return the same array if there are no duplicates
should remove duplicate candidates based on tmdbId and mediaType
should keep the first occurrence when duplicates exist
should return empty array for empty string
